_comment: Per-host case-fan overlay, keyed by the auto-discovered fan id (see GET /status -> case_fans[].id). 'settable: false' makes a channel display-only (no slider, PUT /case-fans rejected). Entries for ids not present on a host are ignored, so this one file can describe every host.

hwmon:nct6798:pwm2.label: AIO pump tach
hwmon:nct6798:pwm2._note: aipc1: not a fan. This motherboard header only reads the H100i Capellix pump's tach (rpm tracks the Commander Core pump); the pump is driven by the Commander Core, so its duty must not be dialed here.
